name: Frosted Banana Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all cake ingredients together and beat with a mixer until well combined.
2. Spread the batter in a sheet cake pan, measuring 15" x 10".
3. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes or until cooled completely.
4. For the frosting: Beat butter and cream cheese together until smooth.
5. Gradually add powdered sugar, stirring constantly until incorporated.
6. Spread the frosting on the cooled bars before serving.
